---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us fix errors in data formatting or scripts.
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## 📝 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the error or data anomaly is.

## 📁 File Affected
List the specific script (e.g., `visualize_data.py`) or data file where the issue occurs.

## 🛠️ Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Run script or open file '...'
3. See error '...'

## 📊 Expected Behavior
A clear description of what you expected to happen instead.

## 🖥️ Environment (if applicable)
- OS: [e.g. Windows, macOS]
- Python Version: [e.g. 3.10]
